prompt: I have a taxable portfolio worth $800K that has drifted from its 60/40 target to 68/32 stocks/bonds. My threshold band is +/- 5%. I also have about $15K in unrealized losses in some equity positions. Should I rebalance, and if so, how should I coordinate with tax-loss harvesting?

assertions.text: Identifies that the 5% band has been breached (68% > 65%)
Recommends harvesting the $15K loss as part of the rebalance
